Automatically root-cause any issue Catch critical issues before you merge and fix them when they hit prod with Seer, our debugging agent and code reviewer . Break production less Predict and prevent the errors that matter most before they even make it to production with AI code review . Stay in the flow From GitHub , Slack , Jira , and Linear to coding agents with Sentry's MCP server , Sentry brings full context to every fix from dev to prod. Everything’s connected Yeah, other tools exist. But errors , logs , replays , spans , profiles , and metrics — all connected by the same trace? That’s kind of our thing. Go from Issue → Context → Fix. Debug 500's, trace slow requests, replay fetch() failures, and fix the broken code that caused it. Catch slow queries, N+1s, and request timeouts before the ‘why is this so slow?’ posts fill up your feed. Map every incident to the release, PR, and owner -- automatically. Debugging needs context— with or without AI Seer , our AI debugger, uses Sentry context – logs, commits, traces, stack trace - so you can stop guessing and it can fix issues for you. Analyzes every signal to explain why your code failed, not just where. Fixes what’s broken while you ship what’s next – generating precise, merge-ready patches. Stops bad code before it starts bad days. Correlating PRs against real error and performance history to catch regressions before they ship. Loved by developers worldwide We wouldn’t have scaled without Sentry. Most of our incidents are hardware-related—and we debug them all inside Sentry Nova DasSarma Systems Lead, Anthropic Sentry’s high-quality tooling helps Disney+ maintain high-quality service to its tens of millions of global subscribers. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex, and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours optimize their application performance and error tracking. I saw that you're currently using Sentry, and I was wondering if you're experiencing any limitations with their platform.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) Oh, Sentry's been working fine for us. What makes you think we need something else? We've already invested a lot of time and resources into integrating it with our systems.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your investment in Sentry, and it's a great tool. However, our solution, DeepData AI, offers more advanced data processing capabilities, such as real-time analytics and machine learning-powered insights. We've seen that companies using Sentry often struggle with data overload and limited visibility into their application performance. Our solution can help you gain a deeper understanding of your data and make more informed decisions.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (concerned about price) That sounds interesting, but I'm not sure if we're ready to take on another expense. Sentry is already a significant cost for us, and I'm not sure if our budget can handle another tool.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that budget is always a concern. However, our solution is designed to be cost-effective and scalable. We offer a flexible pricing model that's based on your actual usage, so you only pay for what you need. Additionally, our solution can help you optimize your resources and reduce costs in the long run by identifying areas of inefficiency and providing actionable insights.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (questioning authority) I'm not sure if I'm the right person to be talking to about this. Our engineering team is responsible for evaluating new tools, and I'd need to get their buy-in before we could consider anything.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely, I'd be happy to set up a demo with your engineering team. In fact, we've had great success with companies similar to yours, and I think our solution could really benefit your team. Would you be open to a 30-minute demo next week to explore how DeepData AI can help your team optimize their application performance and error tracking?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (still slightly hesitant but willing to consider) Alright, let's schedule that demo. I'll talk to our engineering team and see what their availability looks like. But I have to warn you, they can be a tough crowd, so you'll need to be prepared to show them some real value.

analysis.raw:
Score: 7
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Authority
Feedback: The seller should have asked more questions to understand the buyer's current pain points and challenges with Sentry to tailor the pitch and build a stronger connection. Sentiment: Neutral
